description.value: You channel disruptive power that severs a foe's spiritual connection to their magic. Make a melee Strike. This counts as two attacks when calculating your multiple attack penalty. If the attack hits, the target takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,spirit]] damage. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} until it stops taking the persistent spirit damage.
